originalTitle: Samsung strike on hold as workers push for AI bonus
summary: The walkout, which was due to start on Thursday, has been suspended while union members vote on a tentative deal.
content: The walkout, which was due to start on Thursday, has been suspended while union members vote on a tentative deal.
